title: Consistent Sounds
description: replaces most new block sounds with the 7 or so generic versions which have been in the game since the beginning, to make them consistent with every other block
body:
this is a very lightweight resource pack, consisting only of a sounds.json file!
## Changed sounds
### Grass/leaf block sounds
* Azalea leaves
* Cherry leaves
* Moss & Moss Carpet
* Mangrove Roots
* Azaleas and Flowering Azaleas
* Cherry Sapling
* Pink Petals
* Crimson & Warped Fungi
* Bamboo Sapling
* Spore Blossom
* Nether Roots
* Nether Sprouts
* Weeping Vines
* Big Dripleaf
* Small Dripleaf
* Hanging Roots
* Cave Vines
* Sweet Berry Bush
* Crops (planted and broken)

### Wood block sounds
* Bamboo Wood
* Cherry Wood
* Crimson & Warped Planks & Stems
* Chiseled Bookshelf
* All Hanging Signs
* Bamboo (1.5x pitch)
* Scaffolding (1.5x pitch)
* Candle (1.25x pitch)
* Wart Blocks
* Shroomlight

### Stone block sounds
* Deepslate
* Deepslate Bricks, Tiles, & Polished Deepslate
* Dripstone and Pointed Dripstone
* Mud Bricks
* Packed Mud
* Netherrack
* Nether Gold Ore and Nether Quartz Ore
* Crimson & Warped Nylium
* Nether Bricks
* Basalt, Polished Basalt, and Smooth Basalt
* Gilded Blackstone
* Ancient Debris
* Calcite
* Tuff & Tuff blocks
* Decorated Pot
* Lodestone
* Bone Block

### Metal block sounds (stone sounds, 1.5x pitch)
* Netherite Block
* Copper Blocks, Grates, Bulbs, Doors & Trapdoors; Chiseled Copper & Cut Copper
* Lantern
* Trial Spawner
* Vault

### Gravel/dirt block sounds
* Rooted Dirt
* Soul Soil

### Other
* Bamboo, Cherry, Crimson & Warped Buttons match other wooden button sounds
* Bamboo, Cherry, Crimson & Warped Doors match other wooden door sounds
* Bamboo, Cherry, Crimson & Warped Fence Gates match other fence gate sounds
* Bamboo, Cherry, Crimson & Warped Trapdoors match other trapdoor sounds
* Copper Doors and Trapdoors match iron equivalents
* Candle extinguishing sound matches fire extinguishing sound
* Big Dripleaf tilting down and up makes the grass placing sound, with 1.5x pitch
* Soul Sand makes sand sounds
* Froglights make Slime Block sounds
* Muddy Mangrove Roots make Mud sounds
* Heavy Cores make slightly higher-pitched Anvil sounds

## Exceptions
* Amethyst keeps its sounds, because its sounds and vibration resonance ability important to its identity
* Mud keeps its sounds, because none of the generic sounds match it
* Suspicious Sand makes the same sounds as sand, except for the breaking sound
* Suspcious Gravel makes the same sounds as gravel, except for the breaking sound
* Slime Blocks keep their slimy sounds
* Chains keep their rattle-y sounds (possibly subject to chainge)
* Anvils keep their place sound
